title: Combo Sword PvP
description: this is cool texture of swords
body:
this is sword texture.
most the sword there are at down yellow but to part no.
the woodan sword more shine at up, at down more dark.
the stone sword more shine at up, but at middle less shine at down more dark.
the gold sword more shine at all.
the iron sword more shine at all also.
the daimond sword more shine at all.
the netherite sword more dark.
